blocking_issues: The bounded generator path and supplementary ASMS doc-pack hint import now work locally, but the intended first-wave shallow surface map and operator-reviewable summary have not been produced yet from the target-intended Rocky 8 and appliance runtime context.
recommended_next_actions: Keep the implementation task active until the bounded generator is run against the intended Rocky 8 and appliance runtime context.
Reuse the imported ASMS doc-pack hint layer only as supplementary naming, ranking, and port-context support during the target-intended run.
Use the bounded generator to produce the first JSON map and derived Markdown summary under dist/candidates/adf-shallow-surface-map-first-pass/ for the target-intended environment.
Do not deepen into dependency mapping or predictive work before the first machine-readable map and reviewable summary exist.

required_gates.summary: Confirm the fresh successor template remains PackFactory-valid and can materialize a first proving-ground build-pack without broadening the testing surface.
